productDisplayName: Baggit Women Damroo Hosh Purple Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This three-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cmCrafted from genuine leatherette with a three-fold open stylePrint on the upper with a concealed magnetic closuresOne main compartment with eleven card holders, one id card holder, two insert pocketsTwo zippered pockets on the backPrinted branding on the right fold insideCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
